surfaces.uiBlankHandling: empty rows show waiting/blocked text instead of stale local cache
surfaces.degradedDisplayRule: formal API read failure displays error text and does not restore local cache
surfaces.fallbackDisplayRule: fallback/display-only payload may render as display only but must not update latest pointer
surfaces.previousGoodDisplayRule: previous good can remain visible only when receipt/payload preserves previous good
surfaces.negativeTest: renderer uses forbidden static institution JSON or lacks no-local-fallback marker

surfaces.uiBlankHandling: empty rows show waiting latest complete run
surfaces.degradedDisplayRule: fragment returns 503 empty-state when API unavailable
surfaces.fallbackDisplayRule: mobile boot/fragment exposes API-only complete run and does not claim A from static data
surfaces.previousGoodDisplayRule: mobile display follows API payload; previous good must be asserted by payload verifier
surfaces.negativeTest: mobile chip route missing or chip endpoint not /api/institution-latest

surfaces.uiBlankHandling: service worker must not satisfy institution display from retired static path
surfaces.degradedDisplayRule: runtime API failure bubbles to UI receipt/error path
surfaces.fallbackDisplayRule: no static institution fallback for latest API
surfaces.previousGoodDisplayRule: previous good protection is payload/receipt-controlled, not service-worker-forced
surfaces.negativeTest: SW does not list /api/institution-latest or fails to retire data/institution
